name: Demultiplexer
shortDescription: A demultiplexer (DEMUX) takes one input and routes it to one of many outputs based on a select code.
whatIsIt: A demultiplexer (DEMUX) takes one input and routes it to one of many outputs based on a select code.
whyExists: Demultiplexer (DEMUX) distributes a single signal to many destinations, saving lines.
whereUsed: Used in memory addressing, display driving, and bus distribution.
